query: X iOS chat app standalone release date features

mako.raw:
{"query":"X iOS chat app standalone release date features","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1733,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://apps.apple.com/us/app/xchat/id6760873038","title":"‎XChat App - App Store","content":"3 days ago — Chat with anyone on X in a private, focused space built for conversation. No ads. No tracking. Fully end-to-end encrypted.Read more
Fully end-to-end encrypted.
I’m now noticing areas where text and dates wrap on sent posts that include a quote…
For example, if someone writes in English and the user is located in Russia, messages could be automatically translated into Russian.
Also there is missing features like video/voice messages or callsThis app has potential, though now it is not able to be on the same level with Telegram, even not close it is.
This information has not been verified by Apple."},{"url":"https://9to5mac.com/2026/04/24/xchat-xs-standalone-messaging-app-launching-on-iphone-and-ipad-next-week/","title":"XChat, X's standalone messaging app, now available for iPhone and iPad with these features - 9to5Mac","content":"XChat, the standalone messaging app from X, is now available.
X’s new iPhone and iPad app has officially arrived on the App Store.
As of Friday, April 24th, the XChat app has officially launched.
If you’ve ever relied on X or Twitter for communicating with people through direct messages, so far the XChat app looks and feels like a huge upgrade over that experience.
WhatsApp recently overhauled its CarPlay app to work more like Apple’s Messages app.
X hasn’t released CarPlay support for Grok either, although conversational voice iPhone apps like ChatGPT and Perplexity now work in the car.
A preview of the app first showed features like the ability to block screenshots, send disappearing messages, hold group chats, and make video calls.
XChat can be downloaded from the App Store now."},{"url":"https://hypebeast.com/2026/4/xchat-ios-standalone-messaging-app-launches-april-2026","title":"XChat iOS Encrypted Messaging App Release April 2026 | Hypebeast","content":"X Corp. is officially expanding its digital footprint with the introduction of XChat, a standalone messaging application designed exclusively for private communication.
Expected to hit the iOS ecosystem on April 24, the new platform shifts focus away from the public timeline into a dedicated, minimalist environment.
Launching with support for English and 45 additional languages, the release targets a massive international audience right out of the gate."},{"url":"https://techcrunch.com/2026/04/24/x-launches-xchat-app-ios-messaging-iphone/","title":"X launches stand-alone XChat app on iOS | TechCrunch","content":"Initially available on iOS devices, the new app allows users to connect with their X contacts for messaging, file sharing, audio and video calls, as well as group chats.
At launch, the XChat app offers support for messaging and calling, as well as other features that it says are privacy protected, including the ability to edit and delete messages for everyone in the chat; support for disappearing messages; and the ability to block screenshots.
Design team is cooking on these launch videos. pic.twitter.com/u7BIKNp0pc
Sarah has worked as a reporter for TechCrunch since August 2011.
You can contact or verify outreach from Sarah by emailing sarahp@techcrunch.com or via encrypted message at sarahperez.01 on Signal."}]}
